name: Do I need a lawyer for my work breathing injury claim?

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for my work breathing injury claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Recommended—higher wins, no fee unless you win[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: Not required, but lawyers boost success 40-60%, negotiate better settlements, handle denials free on contingency. Complex respiratory proofs need expertise[2]. - No upfront cost. - They front appeals. Call for free consult to assess strength.

description: Recommended—higher wins, no fee unless you win[2].
